flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Salish Kootenai College fell 93% between 2021 and 2024 (26.7% → 1.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Salish Kootenai College fell 55% between 2021 and 2024 (61.8% → 27.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 22 pp at Salish Kootenai College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (35.2% vs 57.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Salish Kootenai College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (60.7% → 82.3%).
